title: no matter + 疑問詞 / -ever 複合詞

formulas.formula: No matter what/who/how/where/when + S + V, S + V
formulas.zh: 無論……如何，主句……；讓步副詞子句，表示無條件地、不管怎樣
無論什麼/誰/如何/何處/何時，主句……；-ever複合關係詞用法

explanation: 讓步副詞子句用於表達「無論如何」的概念。「no matter + 疑問詞」與「-ever複合關係詞」（whatever, whoever, however等）意義相同，可互換使用。此句型強調主句情況不受從句條件影響，呈現無條件性或確定性。主句可置於從句前後。注意：no matter後需接疑問詞；-ever詞可直接作連接詞，句法更緊湊，在學測中使用頻率較高。

examples.eng: No matter how hard he studied, he still failed the exam.
examples.chi: 無論他多努力讀書，他還是沒通過考試。

examples.eng: Whatever you decide, I will support your choice.
examples.chi: 無論你決定什麼，我都會支持你的選擇。

examples.eng: Wherever you go, you should always remember your family.
examples.chi: 無論你去哪裡，你應該永遠記住你的家庭。

examples.eng: No matter who you are, everyone must follow the school rules.
examples.chi: 無論你是誰，每個人都必須遵守校規。

extension.tip: 判斷要點：此句型強調結果的確定性或無條件性。「no matter + 疑問詞」較正式、冗長；「-ever複合關係詞」更簡潔、現代，學測偏好。兩者可互換，但-ever詞用法在英文寫作中更常見。避免混用：不可寫「no matter whatever」。

examples.test: No matter what happens, I will finish this project. vs Whatever happens, I will finish this project.
examples.result: → 兩句意思相同，都表示「無論發生什麼事，我都會完成這個項目」；-ever版本更簡潔

examples.test: ❌ No matter how much you study, you understand nothing. vs ✓ However much you study, you understand nothing.
examples.result: → however much (無論多麼) 比 no matter how much 更自然流暢，後者在口語中較為生硬

examples.test: Whenever you need help, just call me. vs No matter when you need help, just call me.
examples.result: → 前句更自然；no matter when 帶有強調無條件的色彩，slightly more emphatic

extension.note: 「no matter + 疑問詞 = -ever詞」，兩者互換，無論……都……；前句強調條件，後句表達結果確定。

parts: you try, you cannot change the past.
exercises.sentence: No matter how hard you try, you cannot change the past.
exercises.translation: 無論你多努力嘗試，你都無法改變過去。

parts: you choose to study, consistency is the key to success.
exercises.sentence: Whatever way you choose to study, consistency is the key to success.
exercises.translation: 無論你選擇用什麼方式讀書，持之以恆是成功的關鍵。

exercises.sentence: I will protect you, no matter where you are in danger.
exercises.translation: 無論你在哪裡遇到危險，我都會保護你。

parts: happens, we must stay calm and think rationally.
exercises.sentence: No matter what happens, we must stay calm and think rationally.
exercises.translation: 無論發生什麼事，我們必須保持冷靜並理性思考。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的讓步副詞子句，表達無論如何都要堅持的概念
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ you decide, I will always support your choice.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B「Whatever」。此處需要讓步副詞子句表達「無論你決定什麼」。Whatever和No matter what都可使用，但在空格後直接接「you decide」（無賓語重述），Whatever作連接詞最佳。A項「No matter what」需在空格後接完整句構。C項「No matter how」和D項「However」皆表示方式，不符合「決定什麼」的語義。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填入讓步副詞子句，表示無論多努力都達不到目標
mc_exercises.question_eng: No matter _______ hard she works, she cannot reach the top position in the company.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「how」。「No matter how hard」表達「無論多努力」，how搭配形容詞hard修飾動詞works。B項「what」用於「無論什麼事物」，與句義不符。C項「why」表「為什麼」，D項「whether」表「是否」，皆不適合此語境。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的讓步副詞結構，表達無論在何處都適用
mc_exercises.question_eng: Wherever you go, _______ you will find people who appreciate your talent.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是B「I believe that」。此句已使用「Wherever」開頭的讓步副詞子句，主句應為完整句構，需加入主語和動詞。A項重複讓步子句結構不符。C項「however」和D項「no matter how」皆為讓步副詞，與已有的「Wherever」結構重疊衝突。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷which句型中，應使用哪個讓步副詞結構使句義連貫
mc_exercises.question_eng: The project will proceed as planned, _______ opinions you may have about it, because the deadline is immovable.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是A「whatever」。空格後接「opinions you may have」（名詞片語），whatever可直接作連接詞且兼作「opinions」的賓語，用法最緊湊。B項「no matter what」句法較冗長但亦可。C項「however」表方式，不符。D項「no matter however」為文法錯誤，-ever詞與no matter不可並用。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 無論天氣如何，我們都會按時到達學校。
translation_exercises.answer: No matter how the weather is, we will arrive at school on time. / However the weather is, we will arrive at school on time.
hints: 提示1：此題用『how』表示天氣狀況，句型為『No matter how + S + V』或『However + S + V』
提示2：『however』直接作連接詞，後接完整子句，不需加『that』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 無論是誰犯了錯誤，都必須為自己的行為負責。
translation_exercises.answer: No matter who makes the mistake, they must take responsibility for their actions. / Whoever makes the mistake must take responsibility for their actions.
hints: 提示1：『who』引導讓步副詞子句，表示『任何人』的概念，可用『no matter who』或『whoever』
提示2：『whoever』可直接作主語，使句子更緊湊，注意『whoever makes the mistake』本身即為主語

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 無論你去哪裡深造，家人的支持都不會改變。
translation_exercises.answer: No matter where you go to further your studies, your family's support will never change. / Wherever you go to further your studies, your family's support will never change.
hints: 提示1：『where』表地點，句型為『No matter where + S + V』或『Wherever + S + V』，強調地點的多樣性不影響結果
提示2：主句用『will never change』強化『無條件性』，注意『further one's studies』是『深造、進修』的固定搭配

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 無論別人說什麼，只要你堅信自己的夢想，就不應該放棄追求。
translation_exercises.answer: No matter what others say, as long as you believe in your own dreams, you should never give up pursuing them. / Whatever others say, as long as you believe in your own dreams, you should never give up pursuing them.
key_points: believe in one's dreams + should never give up
hints: 提示1：『what』引導讓步副詞子句表示『任何事情』，可用『no matter what』或『whatever』；主句含條件『as long as』加強文意層次
提示2：注意『give up pursuing / give up + V-ing』的用法，以及『believe in one's dreams』（相信某人的夢想）與『believe in oneself』的區別
